# DDAN Hood Cleaning and Repair

## About
DDAN Hood Cleaning and Repair is a family-owned commercial kitchen exhaust system service company based in Mt. Juliet, Tennessee, serving the entire Middle Tennessee region since 2006. We provide NFPA 96 compliant hood cleaning, exhaust fan repair, and parts sales with professional installation for restaurants, churches, schools, hospitals, and all commercial cooking facilities.

## Contact
- Phone: (615) 881-6968 (24/7 emergency line)
- Email: service@ddanhoodcleaning.com
- Service Area: 29 cities across Middle Tennessee and Southern Kentucky
- Emergency: 24/7 dispatch available for exhaust fan failures and urgent cleaning needs
- Languages: English, Spanish (Se Habla Espanol)

## Services

### Hood Cleaning
NFPA 96 compliant commercial kitchen hood cleaning. Every component cleaned to bare metal — hood canopies, exhaust ductwork, exhaust fans, filters, and rooftop grease containment. Before and after photo documentation with compliance certificates. Overnight service available. Serving 14 cities.

### Exhaust Fan Repair
24/7 emergency exhaust fan repair. Same-day motor and belt replacement from local stock. We repair all major brands including CaptiveAire, Loren Cook, Canarm, Greenheck, NAKS, EconAir, and Accurex. Serving 29 cities.

### Parts and Installation
Commercial kitchen exhaust fan parts and professional installation. Upblast fans (direct drive and belt drive), fan motors, belts, bearings, roof curbs, hinge kits, make-up air units, hood filters, grease containment systems, complete hood systems, and fire suppression components. Same-day and next-day parts availability. Discounted installation with parts purchase. Free fitting consultation. Serving 29 cities.

## Service Areas

### Cleaning (14 cities)
Nashville, Murfreesboro, Antioch, Hendersonville, Spring Hill, Smyrna, Gallatin, Lebanon, Goodlettsville, Brentwood, Mount Juliet, Hermitage, Madison, La Vergne

### Repair and Parts (29 cities)
Nashville, Clarksville, Murfreesboro, Antioch, Franklin, Bowling Green KY, Hendersonville, Spring Hill, Smyrna, Gallatin, Lebanon, Brentwood, Columbia, Mount Juliet, Hermitage, Madison, La Vergne, Shelbyville, Springfield, Goodlettsville, Dickson, Nolensville, Portland, White House, Fort Campbell KY, Lewisburg, Hartsville, Fairview, Thompsons Station

- NFPA 96 Compliant
